query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat_messages (id VARCHAR(100) PRIMARY KEY, sender_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, sender_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, sender_type ENUM('driver', 'dispatcher') NOT NULL, recipient_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, recipient_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, content TEXT NOT NULL, timestamp DATETIME NOT NULL, is_read BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
